samples.pinyin: Duì tā de bìng yīshēng men yòng le xǔduō bànfǎ, dàn dōu wújìyúshì.
samples.en: Many remedies were employed by the physicians for his sickness, but all were of no avail.

samples.pinyin: Tā de jiě shì wú jì yú shì.
samples.en: His explanation was of no use.

samples.en: Be shot dead

samples.sentence: 陽光充足有利於植物生長。
samples.pinyin: yángguāng chōngzú yǒu lìyú zhíwù shēngzhǎng.
samples.en: Sufficient sunlight is beneficial for plant growth.

samples.sentence: 他的理由充足，説服了我。
samples.pinyin: tā de lǐyóu chōngzú, shuōfúle wǒ.
samples.en: His reasons were sufficient and convinced me.
samples.vi: Lý do của anh ấy đầy đủ đã thuyết phục được tôi.

samples.sentence: 你們的産品能保證質量嗎？

samples.en: The judge may misjudge the case

samples.meaning: make a mistake; commit an error

samples.en: I have never made a mistake.

samples.pinyin: tā de pànduàn shīwùle.

samples.sentence: 他給我的幫助是無價的。
samples.pinyin: tā gěi wǒ de bāngzhù shì wú jià de.
samples.en: His help to me is invaluable.

samples.sentence: 那段迴憶對我來説無價。
samples.pinyin: nà duàn huíyì duì wǒ lái shuō wú jià.
samples.en: That memory is invaluable to me.

samples.sentence: 他們賠償了我的財産損失。
samples.pinyin: tāmen péichángle wǒ de cáichǎn sǔnshī.

samples.pinyin: tā yāoqiú gōngsī péicháng sǔnshī.
samples.en: He demanded the company compensate for the loss.

samples.pinyin: wǒ de sǎozi hěn shànliáng.

samples.pinyin: tāshízàitàishànliángle.
samples.en: He is really so kind hearted.
samples.vi: Anh ấy quá lương thiện rồi.

samples.sentence: 房子朝南的一麵有兩個窗戶。
samples.pinyin: fáng zi cháo nán de yī miàn yǒu liǎng gè chuāng hù.
samples.en: The house has two windows on the south side.

samples.sentence: 這種紙一麵光, 一麵麻。
samples.pinyin: Zhèzhǒng zhǐ yī miàn guāng, yīmiàn má.
samples.en: This paper is smooth on one side and rough on the other.

samples.sentence: 你的堅持是非常可貴的。
samples.pinyin: nǐ de jiānchí shì fēicháng kěguì de.
samples.en: Your perseverance is truly valuable.

samples.sentence: 她的善良讓人覺得可貴。
samples.pinyin: tā de shànliáng ràng rén juéde kěguì.
samples.en: Her kindness is praiseworthy.

samples.sentence: 我們衕情那些遭遇不倖的人。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen tóngqíng nàxiē zāoyù bùxìng de rén.
samples.en: We sympathize with those who have suffered misfortune.

samples.sentence: 我對他的遭遇錶示衕情。
samples.pinyin: wǒ duì tā de zāoyù biǎoshì tóngqíng.
samples.en: I sympathize with his situation.

samples.pinyin: wǒ yòngshū huàn nǐ de bǐ.
samples.en: I exchange my book for your pen.
samples.vi: Tôi đổi sách lấy bút của bạn.

samples.sentence: 她想用裙子換我的帽子。
samples.pinyin: tā xiǎng yòng qúnzi huàn wǒ de màozi.
samples.en: She wants to trade her dress for my hat.

samples.sentence: 我們已經和解，不再爭吵。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen yǐjīng héjiě, bù zài zhēngchǎo.
samples.en: We have reconciled and no longer quarrel.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi đã hòa giải, không còn cãi nhau nữa.

samples.sentence: 他們和解後變得更加親密。
samples.pinyin: tāmen héjiě hòu biàn dé gèngjiā qīnmì.
samples.en: After reconciling, they became even closer.
samples.vi: Sau khi giảng hòa, họ trở nên thân thiết hơn.

samples.meaning: admit a fault; make an apology; acknowledge a mistake

samples.meaning: admit a fault; make an apology; acknowledge a mistake

samples.pinyin: Tā de xīn zhōng chōngmǎn dà ài.

samples.pinyin: chūle shēn hàn, xiànzài hǎoshòu duōle.

samples.sentence: 他沒來，也就是説他病了。
samples.pinyin: Tā méi lái, yě jiù shì shuō tā bìng le.
